attacking_style: Demonstrates capacity to catch breakaway riders but struggles with final kilometer execution, particularly mistiming sprint acceleration when positioned favorably.
team_tactics: Benefits from Quickstep's numerical advantage and team pace-setting, but appears dependent on domestique work rather than creating own winning opportunities through individual accelerations.
terrain_preference: Can handle varied terrain including gravel sections, though doesn't exhibit explosive acceleration on specialty surfaces despite team support providing optimal positioning.
vulnerability: Final kilometer sprint timing is a critical weakness; unable to convert strong positioning into victories when requiring a decisive late acceleration against fresher finishers.
key_patterns: Mistimes final sprint efforts when in contention, lacking explosive acceleration in closing kilometer (2 observations)
Relies heavily on team numerical advantage and domestique pace rather than personal attacks (2 observations)
Can bridge to breakaways but struggles to finish off winning moves individually (2 observations)
form_trajectory: negative: Both observations show inability to convert favorable positions into wins, suggesting declining finishing power or tactical execution issues
